description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 4-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.
